title: Progression blockers in Disney Dreamlight Valley

evidence.content: I'm new to this game due to it being gifted and the amount of glitches is insane! I can't even complete a few quests due to the item not working!? I have the item in my inventory and the quest says I'm missing the item? Yet it's right there! I've also have gone to save my game multiple times and it

When I first got this game I was so excited to play it and do fun stuff with my fav disney characters.
But now I honestly don't like the game anymore, and if I hadn't put so much time into the game I'd get a refund of it AND the dlc I have.

-There are so many bugs in this game that constantly halt

game has many bugs. You constantly need to exit and restart the game because you get stuck in crafting menu. Cannot finish game because quest bugs. Thousands have reported bugs and they still exist over a year later. Developers don't seem to care. Don't waste your money.
Full of glitches almost every quest

Would love to let my kids play, but the game forces gender-fluidity on you. If your son plays this game, it WILL show him what he would look like in a dress. There's no avoiding it. Thumbs down for Disney's relentless efforts to #transthekids.

Also, there's a whole cross-dressing mission line where
